title: Hotel Booking Reports Extraction: Convert PDF Reports to Excel
metaTitle: Hotel Booking Reports PDF to Excel - Extract Data with AI
metaDescription: Extract hotel booking data from PDF reports to Excel. Convert occupancy sheets, revenue reports, and daily booking summaries for hospitality BI analysis.
h1: Hotel Booking Reports Extraction: Convert PDF Reports to Excel for Business Intelligence

hero.headline: Extract Hotel Booking Data from PDF Reports to Excel
hero.subheadline: Convert daily booking reports, occupancy sheets, and revenue PDFs into structured Excel spreadsheets for hospitality business intelligence and performance analysis.

summary: Hotel booking reports extraction involves converting PDF booking summaries, occupancy reports, and revenue documents into Excel format for analysis. This process enables hospitality managers to aggregate data from multiple properties, track performance metrics, and create comprehensive business intelligence dashboards.
whoItsFor: Hotel revenue managers analyzing occupancy trends
Multi-property hospitality groups consolidating booking data
Hotel operations managers creating performance dashboards
whenThisIsRelevant: Daily booking reports need consolidation across properties
Monthly revenue analysis requires data from PDF exports
Occupancy tracking spreadsheets need automated population
supportedInputs: Daily booking summary PDFs from property management systems
Monthly occupancy report PDFs with room-by-room data
Revenue breakdown reports exported as PDF documents
expectedOutputs: Excel files with booking dates, room numbers, and guest details
CSV files containing occupancy rates and revenue per room
commonChallenges: PDF reports from different PMS systems use varying layouts
Occupancy data spans multiple pages requiring consolidation
Revenue breakdowns contain nested tables with complex structures
Scanned booking reports from older systems have poor text quality
howItWorksSteps: Upload hotel booking PDF reports or occupancy sheets
AI identifies booking data, room numbers, dates, and revenue figures
Select specific fields like guest names, check-in dates, or room rates
Download structured Excel file with extracted booking data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: AI handles different PMS report formats and layouts automatically
Batch processing converts multiple property reports simultaneously
OCR extracts data from scanned legacy booking documents
Custom field selection focuses on relevant hospitality metrics
limitations: Complex multi-property consolidated reports may require field customization
Handwritten guest information in booking logs has limited recognition accuracy
Heavily formatted revenue reports with merged cells may need manual review

faq.question: Can this extract data from different hotel management systems?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI adapts to various PMS report formats including Opera, Fidelio, and RoomMaster exports, automatically identifying booking fields regardless of layout differences.

faq.question: How does it handle multi-page occupancy reports?
faq.answer: The system processes all pages and consolidates booking data into a single Excel file, maintaining relationships between guest information, room assignments, and stay details.

faq.question: What booking data fields can be extracted?
faq.answer: Common fields include guest names, check-in/check-out dates, room numbers, rate codes, revenue amounts, booking sources, and special requests from PDF reports.

faq.question: Does this work with scanned booking reports?
faq.answer: Yes, OCR technology extracts data from scanned documents, though accuracy depends on scan quality and original document clarity from older hotel systems.

trustSignals: 99%+ accuracy on clear hotel booking PDFs
Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
Free trial available with pay-as-you-go pricing
exampleUseCases: Revenue manager extracting weekly booking data from 12 properties for corporate reporting
Operations director converting daily occupancy PDFs to track seasonal booking patterns
Hotel group analyst consolidating reservation data from multiple PMS systems for market analysis
Front office manager extracting guest details from PDF reports for loyalty program updates
